Quoridor — AlphaZero engine, fully in-browser

Pure-JS PUCT MCTS + certificate trumps over the bit-exact v1r net. No Python, no server, no network. You are Blue (P0), bottom → top-goal row. The engine is Orange (P1).
Click a highlighted square to move your pawn. Click a gap strip to place a wall (when in Wall mode and you have walls left).
